_about: Canonical data pool: the single source of truth for demo seeding and the filtered-view evals. Each record carries the filed `application`, its `images` (front first, deduped under images/), `provenance`/licence, `use_cases` tags, and optional per-use-case annotation blocks: `cola_golden` (real-COLA golden verdicts), `ocr_expect` (OOD OCR ground_truth+expect), `corpus_golden` (synthetic golden). Consumers filter by use_case: cola_golden=30, ocr_stress=18, corpus_golden=10, base_seed=7 (the 6 corpus reuses carry a reviewer decision; jb_kirk is base-only). Seeding all distinct records yields 59 live submissions. The corpus_golden records are authored upstream by tests/corpus/cases.py and kept in sync by tests/test_pool.py.

corpus_golden.title: OLD TOM DISTILLERY — clean pass

label.name_and_address: Bottled by Old Tom Distillery, Bardstown, KY
label.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

golden.rationale: All fields match and the warning is verbatim and all-caps.

decision.note: All checks green. Approved for demo.

corpus_golden.title: STONE'S THROW — case-only brand difference (soft warning)
corpus_golden.description: Dave's nuance: the label reads 'STONE'S THROW' in all caps while the application has 'Stone's Throw'. Obviously the same brand, so this is a soft warning, not a hard mismatch.

label.name_and_address: Distilled by Stone's Throw Spirits, Portland, OR
label.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. golden.rationale: Brand differs only by letter case; flag as a soft warning for a human glance rather than failing the label.

application.name_and_address: Bottled by Silver Creek Distillers, Lynchburg, TN

corpus_golden.title: Silver Creek — ABV mismatch (fail)
corpus_golden.description: The most common data-entry error: the application says 45% but the label prints 40%. A genuine numeric mismatch the agent must catch.

label.name_and_address: Bottled by Silver Creek Distillers, Lynchburg, TN
label.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

golden.rationale: Label ABV (40%) does not match the application (45%).

decision.note: Label prints a different ABV than the application. Returned for correction.

application.name_and_address: Brewed by Highland Mist Brewing, Asheville, NC

corpus_golden.title: Highland Mist — title-case government warning (fail)
corpus_golden.description: Jenny's catch: every field matches, but the warning reads 'Government Warning:' in title case instead of the required all-caps 'GOVERNMENT WARNING:'. The exact-match warning path must fail it.

label.name_and_address: Brewed by Highland Mist Brewing, Asheville, NC
label.government_warning: Government Warning: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

golden.rationale: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING:' must be all caps; title case is a non-compliant alteration regardless of other fields matching.

corpus_golden.title: Cedar Ridge — missing government warning (fail)
corpus_golden.description: Fields match but the mandatory government warning is absent from the label entirely. The warning is required on all alcohol beverages, so this fails.

label.name_and_address: Produced and bottled by Cedar Ridge Vineyards, Sonoma, CA
